03 May 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Commercial Ships 'Redirected' By US Forces, As CENTCOM Chief Visits Area Of Operations RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- Dozens of commercial ships have been "redirected" to comply with the American naval blockade of Iranian ports and vessels, the US military said.
  • U.S. Military Supports Launch of Project Freedom in Strait of Hormuz CENTCOM 03 May 2026 -- U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces will begin supporting Project Freedom, May 4, to restore freedom of navigation for commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

  • May 3: Iran tightens grip on Strait of Hormuz and defies blockade as US reels from economic fallout Press TV 03 May 2026 -- Tehran confirmed it has received the US response to its 14-point proposal, delivered through the Pakistani mediators, stressing that the document will be assessed strictly on Iran's terms and within the framework of ending the US-Israeli war of aggression.

  • Trump To Review Latest Iran Proposal But 'Can't Imagine' He'll Accept It RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said he will soon evaluate a new peace proposal offered by Tehran but added that he "can't imagine" it will be acceptable and suggested the possibility of renewed air strikes against Iran.
  • Trump Says US To 'Guide' Stranded Neutral Ships Out Of Hormuz Starting May 4 RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- President Donald Trump said US forces will on May 4 begin guiding stranded "neutral" ships out of restricted waters near the Strait of Hormuz, even as he asserted that Washington was having "positive discussions" with Iran about ending war in the Middle East.

  • Iranian Media: Tehran Received US Response To Latest Peace Proposal RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry said on May 3 that it had received a response from the United States to its latest peace proposal, which Tehran had earlier handed to Pakistan, a country that has been mediating talks between the two countries.
  • Iran says it is reviewing US response to 14-point plan delivered via Pakistani intermediary Press TV 03 May 2026 -- Iran confirmed on Sunday that the United States has delivered its response to Tehran's proposed 14-point plan through Pakistani mediators, and that the Islamic Republic is currently reviewing the document.
  • Any US interference in new Hormuz regime is ceasefire violation: Iran lawmaker Press TV 03 May 2026 -- A senior Iranian parliamentarian has warned that any US interference in the new maritime regime of the Strait of Hormuz will be considered a direct violation of the ceasefire, dismissing President Donald Trump's plan to escort ships through the waterway as "delusional."
  • Iran's armed forces will be ultimate victors in ongoing uneven battle: IRGC spokesman Press TV 03 May 2026 -- The spokesman for the Islamic Revolution Guard Corps has declared that despite an ongoing unequal battle against heavily equipped enemies, Iran's armed forces will emerge as the ultimate victors, driven by the culture of Ashura and an unwavering rejection of humiliation.
  • Leader's advisor warns Trump not to play with 'world's lifeline' Press TV 03 May 2026 -- A senior advisor to Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ali Akbar Velayati, has warned US President Donald Trump not to try to change the status quo in the Strait of Hormuz, which is currently under full control of the Iranian armed forces, saying any such attempt would only make things more complicated for Trump and the US.
  • New law will set conditions for transit through Strait of Hormuz: Deputy speaker Press TV 03 May 2026 -- The Iranian Parliament will approve a new law introducing a new legal regime for the Strait of Hormuz in accordance with directives of Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei, setting the conditions for transit of ships through the strategic waterway, a senior lawmaker said.
  • Leader's advisor warns US carriers, says graveyard ready for 'pirates' Press TV 03 May 2026 -- A senior advisor to Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei says the United States is the "only pirate in the world that possesses aircraft carriers," warning that such carriers will face destruction if tensions escalate.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Raksha Mantri to inaugurate 3-day North Tech Symposium, jointly organised by Indian Army & SIDM, in Prayagraj India PIB 03 May 2026 -- Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh will inaugurate a North Tech Symposium, on the theme 'Raksha Triveni Sangam - Where Technology, Industry & Soldiering Converge', in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh on May 04, 2026. The three-day event is being jointly organised by the Northern Command & Central Command of the Indian Army and the Society of Indian Defence Manufacturers (SIDM).
  • INDIAN ARMY CONTINGENT DEPARTS FOR INDIA-CAMBODIA BILATERAL MILITARY EXERCISE CINBAX-II 2026 India PIB 03 May 2026 -- The Indian Army contingent departed for the second edition of India - Cambodia Bilateral Military Exercise CINBAX-II 2026. The exercise is scheduled to be conducted at Techo Sen Phnom Thom Mreas Prov Royal Cambodian Air Force Training Centre (Camp Basil), Kampong Speu Province, Kingdom of Cambodia from 04 to 17 May 2026. As part of India's ongoing Defence Cooperation with friendly foreign countries, the bilateral exercise CINBAX-II with Cambodia holds significance in the backdrop of evolving global security challenges. The exercise will be conducted under the framework of Chapter VII of UN Mandate, showcasing Company level joint training for conduct of operations in sub-conventional environment.

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 03 May 2026 -- "Israel is stronger than ever, and Israel must always be significantly stronger than our enemies." (...) Regarding strengthening: We are acquiring two squadrons of advanced aircraft - the F-35 and the F-15IA. (...) I have directed investment into the domestic production capacity of munitions."
  • Israel to buy more F-35 fighter jets from US despite Pentagon's arms shortages Press TV 03 May 2026 -- The Israeli regime has approved a plan to purchase more F-35 fighter jets from the United States in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars.
  • Israel MOD Announces: "Gideon" Tanker Aircraft Completes Its Maiden Flight in U.S. Skies Israel MOD 03 May 2026 -- Ahead of its delivery to the Israeli Air Force in approximately one month, the Boeing KC-46 tanker aircraft has successfully completed its maiden flight in the United States.

  • PH, Japanese conduct live-fire drills for 1st time Philippine News Agency 03 May 2026 -- Armored fighting vehicles from the Philippine Army (PA) and the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force (JGSDF) completed their first combined live-fire exercise in Capas, Tarlac over the weekend.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • At Least One Killed, Others Reportedly Injured By Israeli Forces In Lebanon RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- At least one person has been killed by the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) in Lebanon, in the latest armed incident during a shaky cease-fire there between the IDF and Iranian-backed Hezbollah.

  • Child among Palestinians killed as Israeli attacks continue across Gaza, West Bank Press TV 03 May 2026 -- Relentless Israeli attacks continue to intensify across the besieged Gaza Strip and the occupied West Bank, killing civilians and expanding arrests, raids, and bombardment.
  • Israel occupying 62% of Gaza as it expands control beyond ceasefire limits: Hamas Press TV 03 May 2026 -- A senior Hamas official has said that Israeli occupation forces are expanding their control in the besieged Gaza Strip beyond the boundaries set by the ceasefire that took effect in October 2025.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Exclusive: China Coast Guard takes lawful measures against an illegal landing by Philippine crew on Tiexian Jiao Global Times 03 May 2026 -- According to sources, on May 3, five Philippine crew members illegally landed on Tiexian Jiao of China's Nansha Qundao,in disregard of the Chinese side's repeated dissuasion and warnings. The China Coast Guard (CCG) law-enforcement officers identified the intruders and handled the incident in accordance with the law, effectively safeguarding China's territorial sovereignty and maritime rights and interests.
  • AFP lauds 'Atin Ito' Coalition for successful mission to WPS Philippine News Agency 03 May 2026 -- The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) on Sunday commended the Atin Ito Coalition as it successfully reached Pag-asa Island and planted a Philippine flag in Sandy Cay in the West Philippine Sea (WPS) over the weekend.

  • Somaliland ready to expand ties with Israel to counter Yemen: Report Press TV 03 May 2026 -- A senior official in Somaliland has reportedly expressed the readiness of the breakaway region in northern Somalia to expand its ties with the Israeli regime if Yemen closes the strategic Bab al-Mandeb Strait.

News Reports

  • Tanker boarded south of Trelleborg - suspected violation of maritime law Swedish Coast Guard 03 May 2026 -- The Swedish Coast Guard, together with Swedish Police, has boarded the Jin Hui, a tanker sailing under a suspected false flag. A preliminary investigation is underway. The vessel is suspected of being in violation of maritime law due to a lack of seaworthiness.

  • OPEC+ Announces Increased Oil Output After Price Spike RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- Seven of the world's biggest oil producers have announced that they will increase their output "to support oil market stability," days after a dramatic oil price spike amid market fears that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz will not resume anytime soon.
  • Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman Adjust Production and Reaffirm Commitment to Market Stability SPA 03 May 2026 -- The seven OPEC+ countries, which previously announced additional voluntary adjustments in April and November 2023, namely Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman, met virtually on May 3, 2026, to review global market conditions and outlook

  • 'Many precedents' for Lai's surprise visit to Eswatini: MOFA CNA 03 May 2026 -- The decision to announce President Lai Ching-te's (賴清德) visit to Eswatini only after he arrived in the country is not uncommon in international diplomacy, Taiwan's Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MOFA) said Saturday.
  • Lai, Eswatini king reaffirm diplomatic ties; customs deal signed CNA 03 May 2026 -- President Lai Ching-te (賴清德) and King Mswati III on Saturday reaffirmed diplomatic ties during the first day of Lai's visit to Eswatini, after an earlier planned trip to Taiwan's sole African ally was suspended due to revoked overflight permits.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 03 May 2026

  • Answer Given by DPRK Foreign Ministry Spokesperson KCNA 03 May 2026 -- A spokesperson for the Foreign Ministry of the DPRK gave the following answer to a question raised by KCNA on May 3 as regards the fact that the U.S. is hyping a story about the unfounded "cyber threat" from the DPRK:
  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Meets Participants in Eleventh SPYL Congress and Has Photo Session with Them KCNA 03 May 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un , General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and President of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, met the participants in the Eleventh Congress of the Socialist Patriotic Youth League on May 2.

  • Iranian Academic Tells Of Waiting In Line To Use Internet RFE/RL 03 May 2026 -- A report by a semi-official Iranian news agency sheds an intriguing light on Internet usage in the country.

  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on the 80th Anniversary of the Opening of the Tokyo Trials PRC MofA 03 May 2026

  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Prime Minister of Poland Donald Tusk Prime Minister of Canada 03 May 2026
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with President of the European Parliament Roberta Metsola Prime Minister of Canada 03 May 2026
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Prime Minister of Armenia Nikol Pashinyan Prime Minister of Canada 03 May 2026

  • Nikol Pashinyan and Mark Carney meet Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia 03 May 2026 -- Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan met with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney at the Government House.
  • Prospects for Armenia-Kosovo cooperation discussed Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia 03 May 2026 -- Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan met with the acting Prime Minister of Kosovo, Albin Kurti, in the government.
  • Nikol Pashinyan, Inga Ruginienė discuss prospects for further development of Armenia-Lithuania relations Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia 03 May 2026 -- Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan received Lithuanian Prime Minister Inga Ruginienė and her delegation.
  • Nikol Pashinyan, Iliana Yotova meet in Armenia. Armenia and Bulgaria sign declaration on strategic partnership Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia 03 May 2026 -- Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia Nikol Pashinyan hosted the President of the Republic of Bulgaria Iliana Yotova at the Government.
  • The Prime Minister receives OSCE Secretary General Prime Minister of the Republic of Armenia 03 May 2026 -- Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan received OSCE Secretary General Feridun Sinirlioğlu.
